generatedSentence: The finicky main avenger, known for his acute elbows, directed an evermore complex operation in the poverty-stricken district. Under a stern voice, he supervised the unloading of sunflower oil and bouncing balls till the warehouse was full. His inner rhythms would often cringe, as the tonal turnout of the operation felt like navigating a dark tunnel, despite the adjuncts' efforts, but his resolve never nipped. Even with lemonade stains on his underwear, he persisted. The biggest blowup occurred when the known slugger, an elf with a violent streak, instigated a kraken-like conflict, scoring points against the democratic founders. People, including singers and many a gadabout, found the narrative of rising urbanity overly alarming, as rents and illegal activities, like those run by necromancers, were ladled out. This created a vortex of unsettling, unisex chaos, largely lacking proper funding and causing tragic neglect. The addict, known for his finicky habits, interrupted the sequence of trainers filling kapok valves in the factories, causing a leak. He was caught between brackets, his hands tied with ropes, beating against the pallet, his voice a muffled cry. The violent elf, with his oversized proportions, delivered a swift kick, accelerating the tragedy. The koala mascot, bouncing with gummy sweetness, offered hugs to the vagrant people, but it was last, and largely inadequate. In the climax, an avenger, with his unique varieties of kicks, used simulators for a fantastic joust. Eleven clean kilojoules of energy, like a catapult, launched him against the slugger, versus the vertical wall of a boxwood maze, aiming for the main goal. He impressed the people, even the grackle in the sunflower, with his score, reminding them of the true power of democratic empires, no longer lacking; it was his lollipop moment, a note of resolution, eradicating the whirlpools of despair evermore.

imagePrompt: A professional 4-panel comic book page, 2x2 grid, sequential art, vibrant neon futurism, bold ink outlines, cinematic lighting, thick white gutters, clean black borders. The main avenger is a tall, athletic figure wearing a sleek, obsidian-black armored suit with glowing cyan accents, and a distinctive, angular helmet that casts a shadow over his face. TOP-LEFT PANEL: A wide shot of the avenger overseeing an unloading operation in a dystopian, crowded cityscape at dusk, looking stern as cargo drones descend. TOP-RIGHT PANEL: A dynamic medium shot of the violent elf slugger, wielding a glowing, kraken-tentacle-like whip, initiating conflict against a group of panicked citizens amidst collapsing democratic architectural elements, high camera angle. BOTTOM-LEFT PANEL: A close-up on the addict, hands bound with glowing ropes in metallic brackets, struggling against a kapok-filled pallet in a grimy, leaking futuristic factory, low camera angle. BOTTOM-RIGHT PANEL: A full-body shot of the avenger mid-air, delivering a powerful kick against the elf slugger within a glowing boxwood maze, an energy catapult effect visible behind him, from a hero's perspective looking up.

definitions.definition: (of a person) Fastidious and fussy; difficult to please; exacting, especially about details.
definitions.example: My editor is very finicky about punctuation. Every dot and comma has to be just right.

definitions.definition: Demanding; requiring above-normal care.
definitions.example: The lawnmower is a bit finicky in cold weather.

definitions.definition: Short for mainline.
To mainly play a specific character, or side, during a game.
definitions.example: He mains the same character as me in that game.

definitions.definition: Of a road: to convert into a main or primary road.
Of chief or leading importance; prime, principal.
Chief, most important, or principal in extent, size, or strength; consisting of the largest part.
definitions.example: main timbers  main branch of a river  main body of an army

definitions.definition: (of force, strength, etc.) Full, sheer, undivided.
Big; angry.
Belonging to or connected with the principal mast in a vessel.
Great in size or degree; important, powerful, strong, vast.
Exceedingly, extremely, greatly, mightily, very, very much.
One who avenges or vindicates
definitions.example: an avenger of blood

definitions.definition: One who takes vengeance.

Any of several flightless sea birds, of order Sphenisciformes, found in the Southern Hemisphere, marked by their usual upright stance, walking on short legs, and (generally) their stark black and white plumage.
An auk (sometimes especially a great auk), a bird of the Northern Hemisphere.
A nun (association through appearance, because of the black and white habit).
A type of catch where the palm of the hand is facing towards the leg with the arm stretched downward, resembling the flipper of a penguin.
A spiny bromeliad with egg-shaped fleshy fruit, Bromelia pinguin.
The joint between the upper arm and the forearm.

(by extension) Any turn or bend like that of the elbow, in a wall, building, coastline, etc.; an angular or jointed part of any structure, such as the raised arm of a chair or sofa, or a short pipe fitting, turning at an angle or bent.
definitions.example: the sides of windows, where the jamb makes an elbow with the window back

definitions.definition: A detective.
Part of a basketball court located at the intersection of the free-throw line and the free-throw lane.
A hit with the elbow.
To push with the elbow.
definitions.example: He elbowed his way through the crowd.

definitions.definition: (by extension) To nudge, jostle or push.
Always; forever; eternally.
At any time in the future.
A pivot attached to the gunwale (outrigger in a sport boat) of a boat that supports and guides an oar, and provides a fulcrum for rowing; an oarlock (mostly US).
The variation of strong and weak elements (such as duration, accent) of sounds, notably in speech or music, over time; a beat or meter.
definitions.example: Dance to the rhythm of the music.

definitions.definition: A specifically defined pattern of such variation.
definitions.example: Most dances have a rhythm as distinctive as the Iambic verse in poetry

definitions.definition: A flow, repetition or regularity.
definitions.example: Once you get the rhythm of it, the job will become easy.

definitions.definition: The tempo or speed of a beat, song or repetitive event.
definitions.example: We walked with a quick, even rhythm.

definitions.definition: The musical instruments which provide rhythm (mainly; not or less melody) in a musical ensemble.
definitions.example: The Baroque term basso continuo is virtually equivalent to rhythm

definitions.definition: A regular quantitative change in a variable (notably natural) process.
definitions.example: The rhythm of the seasons dominates agriculture as well as wildlife

definitions.definition: Controlled repetition of a phrase, incident or other element as a stylistic figure in literature and other narrative arts; the effect it creates.
definitions.example: The running gag is a popular rhythm in motion pictures and theater comedy

definitions.definition: The method by which a device performs its function.
The method or practice by which actions are done.
The act or process of operating; agency; the exertion of power, physical, mechanical, or moral.
A planned undertaking.
definitions.example: The Katrina relief operation was considered botched.

definitions.definition: A business or organization.
definitions.example: They run a multinational produce-supply operation.

definitions.definition: A surgical procedure.
definitions.example: She had an operation to remove her appendix.

definitions.definition: A procedure for generating a value from one or more other values (the operands).
A military campaign (e.g. Operation Desert Storm)
Effect produced; influence.
A posture or gesture of shrinking or recoiling.
definitions.example: He glanced with a cringe at the mess on his desk.

definitions.definition: A servile obeisance.
A crick.
An embarrassing event or situation which causes an onlooker to cringe.
definitions.example: There was so much cringe in that episode!

definitions.definition: Someone or something that is cringy.
definitions.example: That video was full of cringe.

definitions.definition: To shrink, cower, tense or recoil, as in fear, disgust or embarrassment.
definitions.example: He cringed as the bird collided with the window.

definitions.definition: To bow or crouch in servility.
To contract; to draw together; to cause to shrink or wrinkle; to distort.
In rhythm, the second half of a divided beat.
As a coordinating conjunction; expressing two elements to be taken together or in addition to each other.
(heading) Expressing a condition.
To cause to move faster; to quicken the motion of; to add to the speed of.
To quicken the natural or ordinary progression or process of.
definitions.example: to accelerate the growth of a plant, the increase of wealth, etc.

definitions.definition: To cause a change of velocity.
To hasten, as the occurrence of an event.
definitions.example: to accelerate our departure

definitions.definition: To enable a student to finish a course of study in less than normal time.
To become faster; to begin to move more quickly.
Grow; increase.
An act of acceleration.
definitions.example: the acceleratings and brakings of a vehicle

definitions.definition: An appendage; something attached to something else in a subordinate capacity.
A person associated with another, usually in a subordinate position; a colleague.
An unmalted grain or grain product that supplements the main mash ingredient.
A quality or property of the body or mind, whether natural or acquired, such as colour in the body or judgement in the mind.
A key or scale closely related to another as principal; a relative or attendant key.
(grammar) A dispensable phrase in a clause or sentence that amplifies its meaning, such as "for a while" in "I typed for a while".
(X-bar theory) A constituent which is both the daughter and the sister of an X-bar.
Symploce.
One of a pair of morphisms which relate to each other through a pair of adjoint functors.
A person who has the acute form of a disorder, such as schizophrenia.
An accent or tone higher than others.
An acute accent (´).

definitions.definition: To make acute; to sharpen, to whet.
Brief, quick, short.

definitions.definition: High or shrill.

definitions.definition: Intense, sensitive, sharp.

definitions.definition: Urgent.

definitions.definition: With the sides meeting directly to form an acute angle (at an apex or base).
Of an angle: less than 90 degrees.

definitions.definition: Of a triangle: having all three interior angles measuring less than 90 degrees.

definitions.definition: Of an accent or tone: generally higher than others.
Of an abnormal condition of recent or sudden onset, in contrast to delayed onset; this sense does not imply severity, unlike the common usage.
definitions.example: He dropped dead of an acute illness.

definitions.definition: Of a short-lived condition, in contrast to a chronic condition; this sense also does not imply severity.
definitions.example: The acute symptoms resolved promptly.

definitions.definition: After a letter of the alphabet: having an acute accent.
definitions.example: The last letter of ‘café’ is ‘e’ acute.

definitions.definition: Having a hardness and severity of nature or manner.
Grim and forbidding in appearance.
A flavoured beverage consisting of water, lemon, and sweetener, sometimes ice, served mainly as a refreshment.
A clear, usually carbonated, beverage made from lemon or artificial lemon flavouring, water, and sugar.
Recreational drugs of poor or weak quality, especially heroin.
Liquid fat.
Petroleum-based liquid used as fuel or lubricant.
An oil painting.
Oil paint.
definitions.example: I prefer to paint in oil

definitions.definition: Until; to, up to; as late as (a given time).

definitions.definition: A round or ellipsoidal object.
(mildly, usually in the plural) A testicle.

A bright yellow, like that of the flower petals.
Any flat, radially symmetric organic compound such as coronene

A quitting of employment for the purpose of forcing increase of wages; a strike.
A striker.
That which is prominently brought forward or exhibited; hence, an equipage.

definitions.definition: Net quantity of produce yielded.
Of or relating to tones or tonality.
Of or relating to the general character, mood, or trend of something.
Employing tones that have a predictable relationship to some tonic.
Employing differences in pitch (tones) to distinguish differences in the meaning of otherwise similar words (words which would otherwise be homophonic).
To catch and enclose or compress tightly between two surfaces, or points which are brought together or closed; to pinch; to close in upon.

definitions.definition: Sound made through vibration of the vocal cords; sonant, or intonated, utterance; tone; — distinguished from mere breath sound as heard in whispering and voiceless consonants.
The tone or sound emitted by an object
The faculty or power of utterance

definitions.definition: That which is communicated; message; meaning.
An expressed opinion, choice, will, desire, or wish; the right or ability to make such expression or to have it considered
Command; precept.

(grammar) A particular way of inflecting or conjugating verbs, or a particular form of a verb, by means of which is indicated the relation of the subject of the verb to the action which the verb expresses.

definitions.definition: In harmony, an independent vocal or instrumental part in a piece of composition.

definitions.definition: Mature, conscientious, principled; generous.

(of somebody's age) old, mature. Used to imply that somebody is too old for something, or acting immaturely.

definitions.definition: To experience.

definitions.definition: To be able to distinguish, to discern, particularly by contrast or comparison; to recognize the nature of.

definitions.definition: To be or become aware or cognizant.

definitions.definition: Accepted, familiar, researched.

definitions.definition: The process of making an estimate.
The amount, extent, position, size, or value reached in an estimate.
Esteem or favourable regard.
A luminous spirit presiding over nature and fertility and dwelling in the world of Álfheim (Elfland). Compare angel, nymph, fairy.

Any from a race of mythical, supernatural beings resembling but seen as distinct from human beings. They are usually delicate-featured and skilled in magic or spellcrafting; sometimes depicted as clashing with dwarves, especially in modern fantasy literature.

definitions.definition: The human genitalia; specifically, the penis.

To deliver (someone or something) following a judicial decision.

definitions.definition: Relating to a political party so called; usually, Democratic.

Very large; especially of something larger than normal for its type.

To set aside, discount, ignore.

The kind of theatrical entertainment given in variety shows.
The production of, or performance in, variety shows.
An opening into which a plug or other connecting part is designed to fit (e.g. a light bulb socket).
A hollow into a bone which a part fits, such as an eye, or another bone, in the case of a joint.
One endpoint of a two-way communication link, used for interprocess communication across a network.
One endpoint of a two-way named pipe on Unix and Unix-like systems, used for interprocess communication.
A hollow tool for grasping and lifting tools dropped in a well-boring.
The hollow of a candlestick.
A steel apparatus attached to a saddle to protect the thighs and legs.
A cricket team of eleven players. Hence first eleven - the team of best cricket players (at a school), second eleven - the "B" team, etc.
A football team of eleven players; the starting lineup.
Used instead of ! to amplify an exclamation, imitating someone who forgets to press the shift key while typing exclamation points.
definitions.example: A: SUM1 Hl3p ME im alwyz L0ziN!!?!

definitions.definition: A number off the charts of a hypothetical scale of one to ten.
The cardinal number occurring after ten and before twelve. Represented as 11 in Arabic digits.
The act of impressing.
An impression; an impressed image or copy of something.
A stamp or seal used to make an impression.
An impression on the mind, imagination etc.
Characteristic; mark of distinction; stamp.
A heraldic device; an impresa.
The act of impressing, or taking by force for the public service; compulsion to serve; also, that which is impressed.
To affect (someone) strongly and often favourably.
definitions.example: You impressed me with your command of Urdu.

definitions.definition: To make an impression, to be impressive.
definitions.example: Henderson impressed in his first game as captain.

definitions.definition: To produce a vivid impression of (something).
definitions.example: That first view of the Eiger impressed itself on my mind.

definitions.definition: To mark or stamp (something) using pressure.
definitions.example: We impressed our footprints in the wet cement.

definitions.definition: To produce (a mark, stamp, image, etc.); to imprint (a mark or figure upon something).
To fix deeply in the mind; to present forcibly to the attention, etc.; to imprint; to inculcate.
To compel (someone) to serve in a military force.
definitions.example: The press gang used to impress people into the Navy.

definitions.definition: To seize or confiscate (property) by force.
definitions.example: The liner was impressed as a troop carrier.

definitions.definition: A drama or similar work, in which the main character is brought to ruin or otherwise suffers the extreme consequences of some tragic flaw or weakness of character.
The genre of such works, and the art of producing them.
A disastrous event, especially one involving great loss of life or injury.
A device or weapon for throwing or launching large objects, such as a mechanical aid on aircraft carriers designed to help airplanes take off from the flight deck.
Slingshot
An instance of firing a missile from a catapult.
An instance of firing something, as if from a catapult.
To fire a missile from a catapult.
To fire or launch something, as if from a catapult.
To increase the status of something rapidly.
definitions.example: The candidate selection for running mate has catapulted her to the national scene.

definitions.definition: To be fired from a catapult or as if from a catapult.
To have one's status increased rapidly.
definitions.example: She catapulted to the national scene following her selection by the candidate.

definitions.definition: Removal of dirt.
definitions.example: This place needs a clean.

definitions.definition: The first part of the event clean and jerk in which the weight is brought from the ground to the shoulders.
To remove dirt from a place or object.
definitions.example: Can you clean the windows today?

definitions.definition: To tidy up, make a place neat.
definitions.example: Clean your room right now!

definitions.definition: To remove equipment from a climbing route after it was previously lead climbed.
To make things clean in general.
definitions.example: She just likes to clean. That’s why I married her.

definitions.definition: To remove unnecessary files, etc. from (a directory, etc.).
To brush the ice lightly in front of a moving rock to remove any debris and ensure a correct line; less vigorous than a sweep.
To purge a raw of any blemishes caused by the scanning process such as brown tinting and poor color contrast.
To remove guts and/or scales of a butchered animal.
(heading, physical) Free of dirt or impurities or protruberances.
(heading, behavioural) Free of immorality or criminality.
Smooth, exact, and performed well
definitions.example: I’ll need a sharper knife to make clean cuts.  a clean leap over a fence

definitions.definition: Total; utter. (still in "clean sweep")
Cool or neat.
definitions.example: Wow, Dude, those are some clean shoes ya got there!

definitions.definition: (health) Being free of sexually transmitted diseases (STDs).
definitions.example: I want to make sure my fiancé is clean before we are married.

definitions.definition: That does not damage the environment.
definitions.example: clean energy;  clean coal

definitions.definition: Free from that which is useless or injurious; without defects.
definitions.example: clean land;  clean timber

definitions.definition: Free from restraint or neglect; complete; entire.
Well-proportioned; shapely.
definitions.example: clean limbs

definitions.definition: (of a route) Ascended without falling.
Fully and completely.
definitions.example: He was stabbed clean through.

definitions.definition: (heading) A symbol or annotation.
(heading) A written or printed communication or commitment.
(heading) A sound.
Observation; notice; heed.
Reputation; distinction.
definitions.example: a poet of note

definitions.definition: Notification; information; intelligence.
Mark of disgrace.
To notice with care; to observe; to remark; to heed.
definitions.example: If you look to the left, you can note the old cathedral.

definitions.definition: To record in writing; to make a memorandum of.
definitions.example: We noted his speech.

definitions.definition: To denote; to designate.
definitions.example: The modular multiplicative inverse of x may be noted x-1.

definitions.definition: To annotate.
To set down in musical characters.
To record on the back of (a bill, draft, etc.) a refusal of acceptance, as the ground of a protest, which is done officially by a notary.
A result that one is attempting to achieve.
definitions.example: My lifelong goal is to get into a Hollywood movie.

definitions.definition: In many sports, an area into which the players attempt to put an object.
The act of placing the object into the goal.
A point scored in a game as a result of placing the object into the goal.
A noun or noun phrase that receives the action of a verb. The subject of a passive verb or the direct object of an active verb. Also called a patient, target, or undergoer.
To score a goal.
The box tree, Buxus sempervirens.
The hard, close-grained wood of this tree, used in delicate woodwork and in making inlays.
Any tree of genus Buxus.
A tilting match: a mock combat between two mounted knights or men-at-arms using lances in the lists or enclosed field.
To engage in mock combat on horseback, as two knights in the lists; to tilt.
To engage in verbal sparring over an important issue. (used of two people, both of whom participate more or less equally)
To touch penises while engaging in a sex act, especially oral sex.
A portable platform, usually designed to be easily moved by a forklift, on which goods can be stacked, for transport or storage.
A flat base for combining stores or carrying a single item to form a unit load for handling, transportation, and storage by materials handling equipment.
(DOD only) 463L pallet – An 88” x 108” aluminum flat base used to facilitate the upload and download of aircraft.
To load or stack (goods) onto pallets.
In a widespread or large manner.
For the most part; mainly or chiefly.
definitions.example: They were largely successful in their efforts.

definitions.definition: On a large scale; amply.
Fully, at great length.
An item of confectionery consisting of a piece of candy/sweet attached to a stick.
Against; in opposition to.
definitions.example: It is the Packers versus the Steelers in the Super Bowl.

definitions.definition: Compared with, as opposed to.

Bringing a legal action against, as used in the title of a court case in which the first party indicates the plaintiff (or appellant or the like), and the second indicates the defendant (or respondent or the like).
definitions.example: Brown v. Board of Education of Topeka, Kans.

definitions.definition: A vertex or zenith.
A vertical geometrical figure; a perpendicular.
An individual slat in a set of vertical blinds.
A vertical component of a structure.
A vertical market.
definitions.example: We offer specialised accounting software targeting various verticals.

definitions.definition: Standing, pointing, or moving straight up or down; along the direction of a plumb line; perpendicular to something horizontal.
In a two-dimensional Cartesian co-ordinate system, describing the axis y oriented normal (perpendicular, at right angles) to the horizontal axis x.
In a three-dimensional co-ordinate system, describing the axis z oriented normal (perpendicular, orthogonal) to the basic plane xy.
Of or pertaining to vertical markets.
(wine tasting) Involving different vintages of the same wine type from the same winery.
Of an interval: having the two notes sound simultaneously.
Someone who restlessly moves from place to place, seeking amusement or the companionship of others.
Any of several American blackbirds of the genus Quiscalus, and related genera, having iridescent plumage.
(formerly) Any of several Asian myna birds of the genus Gracula.
To pay for.
definitions.example: He used his inheritance to fund his gambling addiction.

definitions.definition: To place (money) in a fund.
To form a debt into a stock charged with interest.
The action of the verb fund.
Money provided as funds.
definitions.example: The council is providing funding to the church to repair the roof.

definitions.definition: An SI unit of energy equal to 103 joules. Symbol: kJ
